hero.title: Ensure Proper Care for Your Pets & Livestock
hero.subtitle: The first bilingual care and services platform built for the Bangladeshi context. Get expert advice and services for cats, dogs, cows, goats, and more.

ai.welcome: Hello! I am your AI Care Assistant. Let me know what symptoms or issues your pet or livestock is facing.
ai.step_animal: 1. Which animal are you asking about?
ai.step_problem: 2. Describe what you notice in detail (Bangla or English):
ai.placeholder_problem: e.g., My cat hasn't eaten anything since morning and seems lethargic...
ai.step_chat: 3. Please answer a few questions to help me understand better:
ai.turns_remaining: You have {count} free questions remaining. Please register or login for full discussions.
ai.no_providers: Sorry, no providers in this category were found in your area.

guidelines.title: Care & Rearing Guidelines
guidelines.subtitle: Learn proper guidelines for rearing, feeding, and disease management of your animals.

vaccination.title: Vaccine & Medicine Reference
vaccination.subtitle: Check the correct dosage, timing, and schedule of vaccines to prevent diseases.
vaccination.search_placeholder: Search by vaccine or disease name...

providers.title: Service Providers Directory
providers.subtitle: Find verified veterinary surgeons, groomers, sitters, and pharmacies near you.
providers.no_providers: No service providers found in this area.

bookings.title: Book an Appointment
bookings.notes_placeholder: Mention any specific symptoms or special requests...
bookings.success: Your booking request has been submitted! You will be notified once the provider confirms.

rehoming.title: Pet Rehoming & Adoption
rehoming.subtitle: Find safe and loving new homes for cats and dogs. 100% free and local.
rehoming.notice: Only cat and dog rehoming is supported. Buying/selling animals is strictly prohibited.
rehoming.apply_message: Explain why you wish to adopt this pet and describe your pet care experience:
rehoming.apply_placeholder: I will provide a safe home and a warm bed, with plenty of playing space...
rehoming.success_apply: Your application was submitted successfully! Waiting for owner's response.
rehoming.no_listings: No active rehoming listings found in your area.

govt.title: Govt & NGO Help Resources
govt.subtitle: Upazila and district level government veterinary hospitals, NGOs, and emergency support hotlines.
govt.no_resources: No resources found in this district.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.no_pets: No pets added to your profile yet.

auth.name: Full Name
auth.select_role_desc: Choose 'Service Provider' if you offer veterinary, grooming, or caretaking services. Choose 'Farmer' for livestock, or 'Pet Owner' for companion animals.
auth.no_account: Don't have an account? Register here
auth.have_account: Already have an account? Log in
